# godaddy_domain_dnssec_records (Resource)

Manage the full DNSSEC record set for an existing GoDaddy domain.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) Existing GoDaddy domain to manage.
- `records` (Attributes List) Full desired DNSSEC record set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--records))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Canonical resource identifier equal to the domain name.

<a id="nestedatt--records"></a>
### Nested Schema for `records`

Required:

- `algorithm` (String) Algorithm.
- `digest` (String) Digest.
- `digest_type` (String) Digest type.
- `key_tag` (Number) Key tag.

Optional:

- `flags` (String) Optional key role flags.
- `max_signature_life` (Number) Optional max signature life.
- `public_key` (String) Optional public key.
